title: Write YouTube Scripts Using This Viral FORMULA
description:
90% creators ye script mistake karte hain  aur unhe pata bhi nahi.
Agar tumhara watch time kam hai aur log video beech mein band kar 
dete hain, toh ye video dekho. YouTube script kaise likhe jo viewers 
ko end tak roke wohi exact formula yahan hai.

Is video mein maine wo exact YouTube script writing formula share 
kiya hai jo viewers ko end tak rokta hai. Ye wohi framework hai jo 
bade YouTubers use karte hain  chahe tum youtube scripting abhi 
shuru kar rahe ho ya already videos bana rahe ho aur results nahi 
aa rahe.

Is video mein tum seekhoge viewer psychology kaise kaam karti hai, 
aisa hook kaise likho jo scroll rok de, open loops se log kaise 
bande rehte hain video mein, Depth Moment kya hota hai aur ye kyun 
sab kuch badal deta hai, aur wo common script writing mistakes jo 
tumhare views kill kar deti hain.

Agar tum jaanna chahte ho how to write a script for a youtube video 
jo actually perform kare, ya how to write script for youtube video 
in hindi toh ye video sirf tumhare liye bani hai. YouTube script 
writing for beginners ho ya experienced creator ye formula 
sabke liye kaam karta hai.

вң… End tak zaroor dekho sabse important part beech mein aata hai.

title: How to Record Mic Quality Voice on Mobile ( Pro Tips! )
description:
In this video, I show you how to record studio-quality voice using only your phone вҖ“ no external mic needed.

If your mobile recordings sound noisy or unclear, this complete step-by-step guide will help you get clean professional audio at home using simple techniques + free AI tools.

I cover everything from:

вң” Proper room setup for voice recording
вң” Correct mobile mic distance
вң” Phone stability while recording
вң” Breathing technique for clean audio
вң” Multiple takes workflow
вң” Noise reduction basics
вң” How to enhance voice using FREE AI
вң” Final audio adjustment using BandLab

This tutorial is perfect for:

рҹҺӨ YouTubers
рҹҺӨ Content creators
рҹҺӨ Voiceover artists
рҹҺӨ Reel / Shorts creators
рҹҺӨ Podcast beginners

No expensive mic.
No studio.
Just your phone + correct technique.

рҹ”Ҙ FREE AI VOICE ENHANCEMENT WEBSITE (Used in Video)

Use this website to clean + enhance your recorded voice:

рҹ‘ү https://myedit.online/en/audio-editor

Steps:

Open the website

Login

Go to Audio вҶ’ Speech Enhancement

Upload your recorded voice

Download enhanced audio

(Free version allows limited downloads per day.)

рҹҺӣ BANDLAB FINAL VOICE ADJUSTMENT (Exact Settings)

After AI enhancement, import audio into BandLab and apply these:

рҹ”№ Compressor (TecLab BA-2A)

Gain: 62
Squeeze: 65
Mode: Compress

рҹ”№ Multi Filter

Filter Type: Highpass
Frequency: 120 Hz
Resonance: 2.0
Gain: 0.0 dB

рҹ”№ EQ3-M (Equalizer)

Low: -11.9 dB
Mid: +11.9 dB
High: +11.6 dB
Mid Sweep: 150 Hz

Save this as your own preset so next time you can apply in one click.

After this, export audio and use directly in your video.

Result:
вң” Noise reduced
вң” Voice clearer
вң” Studio-like feel

рҹ’¬ Comment which phone you use for recording.

title: Small Channels Ki Sabse Badi Galti рҹҳұ (Maine Bhi Ki Thi)
description:
Kuch din pehle maine ek video upload ki вҖ”11 minute ki, full planning, editing sab kuch perfect. YouTube ne us video ko 11,000 impressions diye. Mujhe laga ab toh viral рҹ”Ҙ

рҹ‘ү Reality check: Sirf 176 clicks CTR sirf 1.6% Aur average view duration sirf 1вҖ“1.5 minute

Tab mujhe samajh aaya вҖ” вқҢ Main YouTube pe bahut badi galtiyan kar raha tha.

Is video me maine exact wahi galtiyan explain ki hain jo: Small channels ki growth ko maar deti hain CTR ko low kar deti hain Audience ko first 30 seconds me bhaga deti hain Aur creators ko demotivate kar deti hain

рҹ‘ү Ye video theory nahi hai рҹ‘ү Ye real analytics + real experiment hai

рҹҡЁ Is video me tum seekhoge: вң” Thumbnail & title ka CTR pe real impact вң” 1.6% CTR ka matlab kya hota hai вң” First 30 seconds boring hue toh kya hota hai вң” YouTube hook kaise banana chahiye (2026 logic) вң” SEO ka practical use (search + browse) вң” Analytics kaise read karni chahiye вң” Demotivation se kaise bahar nikle

Ye video chhote creators ke liye hai jo: 50вҖ“500 subscribers pe stuck hain Views nahi aa rahe Aur seriously YouTube grow karna chahte hain

рҹ“Ң Ye ek live experiment hai. 24вҖ“48 hours baad main comments me update dunga ki: CTR, retention aur impressions ka result kya aaya.

Agar tum bhi YouTube seriously le rahe ho вҖ” рҹ‘ү end tak dekho рҹ‘ү comment me batao tum kaunsi galti kar rahe ho

рҹ‘Қ Like | рҹ’¬ Comment | рҹ”” Subscribe Keep creating. Keep improving. рҹҡҖ
